positive: A minimalist, central composition featuring a stylized crescent moon cradling a constellation of geometric, glowing stars. The design should utilize strong, deep navy blue and metallic gold linework against a crisp, creamy off-white background. Style must be sophisticated abstract line art with visible ink texture, reminiscent of modern cosmic folk art. Emphasize clean silhouettes, symmetry, and high contrast suitable for screen printing on apparel. Minimalist, ethereal, geometric, linocut style, central focus.
